title: Market Research Analyst
description:
Lockheed Martin is a global aerospace and defense company serving government and commercial customers with advanced technologies.

We're seeking a Market Research Analyst to join our Defense team in Austin. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Conduct market research and competitive analysis to inform strategic planning
Design and execute market surveys and research methodologies
Analyze market data and develop insights on customer behavior and preferences
Prepare detailed research reports and executive presentations
Monitor industry trends and economic indicators
Support business development with market sizing and opportunity assessments

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, Economics, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in market research, business analysis, or business development
